description: Eval cases for funding readiness scoring and compliance-safe funding preparation language.

tests.input: My business has 36 months operating history, $85K monthly revenue, positive cash flow, P&L, balance sheet, bank statements, tax returns, and a debt schedule. Score funding readiness.
I have revenue but no P&L, no balance sheet, no debt schedule, and inconsistent bank deposits. Am I ready for funding?
expectedBehaviors: Says score is preliminary or directional

tests.input: Revenue is $40K/month, debt payments are $16K/month, cash balance is $8K, and I want another $100K. Score funding readiness.
expectedBehaviors: Recommends improving repayment capacity before pursuing more debt

tests.input: I want $50K but I do not know what I will use it for. I just want cushion.
expectedBehaviors: Explains why vague capital requests weaken readiness
